1897960.name: Meet Cute: Delivery 🐾
1897960.description:
Have you ever found yourself in a situation where you randomly meet the girl of your dreams, only to never see her again? Perhaps it was a girl on the street, in a café, or even a delivery girl?

Well, fortune is on your side today! Your dream delivery girl literally falls into your arms.

Discover what happened to her, spend time together, and take care of her.

Meet Cute: Delivery is a small kinetic novel that can be read in less than an hour. No serious topics, no drama—just a slice of life featuring you and Lily.

FEATURES:

  • A captivating meet-cute story

  • HD, fully original artwork

  • Approximately 1 hour of content

  • A relaxing atmosphere

  • A cute delivery girl!
